cluster_ids.name: On/Off
cluster_ids.summary: Controls the on/off state of a device. Supports features like Lighting and DeadFrontBehavior.

classifications.summary: Base level application role for endpoint control with on/off functionality.

revisions.description: Mandatory global ClusterRevision attribute added; CCB 1555
FeatureMap global attribute support with Level Control and Lighting feature
New data model format and notation
Addition of Dead Front behavior and associated FeatureMap entry
Addition of OffOnly feature and associated FeatureMap entry

features.name: Lighting
features.summary: Behavior that supports lighting applications. On Level Control command setting OnOff to FALSE, OnTime set to 0; if TRUE and OnTime is 0, OffWaitTime set to 0.

features.name: DeadFrontBehavior
features.summary: Device exhibits 'dead front' behavior when OnOff is FALSE. Other clusters may respond with failures or change attributes to best-effort values.

features.name: OffOnly
features.summary: Off command supported; On and Toggle commands not supported. Useful for devices turned off via Off command but not on due to regulations.

values.name: AcceptOnlyWhenOn
values.summary: Indicates a command is only accepted when in On state.

values.name: Off
values.summary: Set the OnOff attribute to FALSE

values.name: On
values.summary: Set the OnOff attribute to TRUE

values.name: Toggle
values.summary: Toggle OnOff attribute between TRUE and FALSE.

values.name: DelayedOffSlowFade
values.summary: 50% dim down in 0.8 seconds then fade to off in 12 seconds

values.name: DyingLightFadeOff
values.summary: 20% dim up in 0.5s then fade to off in 1 second

attributes.name: OnOff
attributes.summary: Indicates if the device is turned on (TRUE) or off (FALSE).

attributes.name: GlobalSceneControl
attributes.summary: Prevents storing all-devices-off as a global scene; TRUE after On command.

attributes.name: OnTime
attributes.summary: Specifies time (1/10s) On state is maintained before auto Off.

attributes.name: OffWaitTime
attributes.summary: Specifies time (1/10s) Off state is guarded to prevent OnWithTimedOff.

attributes.name: StartUpOnOff
attributes.summary: Defines startup behavior; OnOff set to previous or defined value.

commands.name: Off
commands.summary: Turns off the device by setting OnOff attribute to FALSE.
commands.effect_on_receipt: set OnOff := FALSE; if OnTime supported then set OnTime := 0;

commands.name: On
commands.summary: Turns on the device by setting OnOff attribute to TRUE.
commands.effect_on_receipt: if OffOnly supported then send UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND; else set OnOff := TRUE; if OnTime = 0 then set OffWaitTime := 0;

commands.name: Toggle
commands.summary: Toggles the OnOff attribute between TRUE and FALSE.
commands.effect_on_receipt: if OffOnly supported then send UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND; else if OnOff = FALSE then set OnOff := TRUE; else set OnOff := FALSE; if OnOff = FALSE and OnTime = 0 then set OffWaitTime := 0; if OnOff = TRUE then set OnTime := 0;

commands.name: OffWithEffect
commands.summary: Turns off the device with a fading effect.

fields.name: EffectIdentifier
fields.summary: Specifies the fading effect to use.

fields.name: EffectVariant
fields.summary: Indicates which variant of the effect to trigger.

commands.effect_on_receipt: if GlobalSceneControl = TRUE then store settings in global scene; set GlobalSceneControl := FALSE; set OnOff := FALSE; if OnTime supported then set OnTime := 0; else set OnOff := FALSE;

commands.name: OnWithRecallGlobalScene
commands.summary: Recalls settings when the device was turned off.
commands.effect_on_receipt: if GlobalSceneControl = TRUE then discard command; else call Scenes Management cluster to recall global scene; set GlobalSceneControl := TRUE; if OnTime = 0 then set OffWaitTime := 0;

commands.name: OnWithTimedOff
commands.summary: Turns on device for a specific duration with guarded off duration.

fields.name: OnOffControl
fields.summary: Specifies operation conditions for the server.

commands.effect_on_receipt: if OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn = 1 and OnOff = FALSE then discard command; if OffWaitTime > 0 and OnOff = FALSE then set OffWaitTime := min(OffWaitTime, OffWaitTime field); else set OnTime := max(OnTime, OnTime field); set OffWaitTime := OffWaitTime field; set OnOff := TRUE; update OnTime and OffWaitTime every 1/10 second until both = 0; if OnOff = TRUE and OnTime > 0 then decrement OnTime; if OnTime = 0 then set OffWaitTime := 0; set OnOff := FALSE; if OnOff = FALSE and OffWaitTime > 0 then decrement OffWaitTime; if OffWaitTime = 0 then terminate update;

State Description.pseudocode: if OnTime != 0xFFFF then every 100ms: OnTime := OnTime - 1
if OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF then every 100ms: OffWaitTime := OffWaitTime - 1

references.name: Scenes Cluster
references.description: Scene storage for scene attrs (if mentioned)
